calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JESSE BARNETT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR #5162.
Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared with plaintiff N.R. Patel, owner of the property in question.
Plaintiff N.R. Patel was placed under oath and examined.
No Appearance by defendant Jesse Barnett.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit---------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff N.R. PATEL and against defendant JESSE BARNETT as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendant JESSE BARNETT Rent and Per Diem in the sum of $1,329.88, Costs in the amount of $195.00, for a total judgment of $1,524.88.
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 106 Sixth Street, #216, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
N.R. Patel, plaintiff
Arnold Walter Evje, III, Esq., counsel for plaintiff

No appearance by defendant Jesse Barnett.

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
